scripts.build:web: VITE_BUILD_TARGET=web VITE_WEB_BASE=/sorcery/ tsc -b && VITE_BUILD_TARGET=web VITE_WEB_BASE=/sorcery/ vite build
scripts.build:cf: VITE_BUILD_TARGET=web VITE_WEB_BASE=/ tsc -b && VITE_BUILD_TARGET=web VITE_WEB_BASE=/ vite build --mode production
scripts.cf:assets:deploy: npm run cf:assets:prepare && npx wrangler pages deploy .cf-pages-assets --project-name drawaspell-assets --branch main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.cf:pages:deploy: npm run build:cf && node ./scripts/prune-cf-app-assets.mjs && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name drawaspell --branch main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.cf:deploy:all: npm run cf:assets:deploy && npm run cf:pages:deploy
